description_long: This is a red, cylindrical fire extinguisher with a rounded top and a flat base, mounted on a square red pedestal. The extinguisher features a black hose attached near the top, ending in a yellow nozzle, which is secured vertically along the side of the cylinder. A prominent label with Korean text and pictograms is affixed to the front, providing instructions and identification. The top of the extinguisher has a metal handle and a red lever, likely for operation, with a visible safety pin. The pedestal base is labeled in both Korean and English, reading 'Fire Extinguisher' in white text. The overall appearance is clean, well-maintained, and designed for high visibility in emergency situations.
description: A red cylindrical fire extinguisher with a black hose and yellow nozzle, mounted on a labeled red pedestal. It features a prominent instructional label and a metal handle with a safety pin.
description_view_0: Front view showing the instructional label, black hose, yellow nozzle, and clear 'Fire Extinguisher' signage on the pedestal.
description_view_1: Angled view highlighting the full instructional label, handle, and the attachment of the hose to the side.
description_view_2: Side view displaying the cylindrical body, the black hose running vertically, and the yellow nozzle resting against the pedestal.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the back of the extinguisher, the full length of the black hose, and the yellow nozzle secured at the bottom.
attribute_label_or_signage: A large rectangular label with Korean text and pictograms is present on the front of the cylinder; the pedestal base also has white text in Korean and English ('Fire Extinguisher').
attribute_mounting_bracket_or_holder: A red square pedestal base supports the extinguisher, holding it upright; no wall bracket is visible.
attribute_hose_or_nozzle: A black hose is attached near the top, running vertically down the side, ending in a yellow nozzle secured at the base.
attribute_pressure_gauge: A small circular component is visible at the top near the handle, likely a pressure gauge, with a metallic finish.
attribute_safety_pin_or_seal: A metallic safety pin is visible at the top, inserted through the handle mechanism.
